Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 65 

HYPERP_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the benign prostatic hyperplasia indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Condition 
Warehouse (CCW) benign prostatic hyperplasia indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries
